description.ko: 기술과 식물학이 뒤얽혀 빛을 발하는 식물군과 디지털화된 생태계가 만들어내는 초현실적인 풍경을 보여주는 숨막히는 비전입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking vision of a world where technology and botany intertwine, creating a surreal landscape of light-emitting flora and digitized ecosystems.

prompt: Hyper-realistic digital nature scene, bioluminescent exotic flowers with glowing fiber-optic petals, circuit board patterns integrated into leaf veins, holographic butterflies fluttering in a synthwave forest, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, vibrant cyan and magenta color palette.
